message:
fix(ftui-core): allow unsafe_code in tests for env var helpers

Rust 2024 marks std::env::{set_var,remove_var} as unsafe. This change
allows targeted #[allow(unsafe_code)] in test modules while keeping
forbid(unsafe_code) for production code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@
-#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+// Forbid unsafe in production; deny (with targeted allows) in tests for env var helpers.
+#![cfg_attr(not(test), forbid(unsafe_code))]
+#![cfg_attr(test, deny(unsafe_code))]
 
 //! Core: terminal lifecycle, capability detection, events, and input parsing.
